title: SGP-Clipper: SEO Content Browser Extension
tagline: Chrome Extension for Streamlined Article Publishing Pipeline
description: Built a Chrome extension that bridges public business-registry data into the production prompt and spreadsheet flow.
Integrated directly with PageShutter workflow to automate data enrichment before generation.
Reduced per-task processing time from **~15 minutes to ~7-8 minutes** (≈50% faster) by bridging data sources.
impact: Optimized article generation from **30 minutes to 10 minutes overall** when used with PageShutter
Bridged public business-registry data into production prompt flow automatically
Reduced image-resize step from ~45s to ~15s (3× faster) in pipeline
